Una

System / Location · First seen 3301-07-23 · 3 mentions
EDSM ↗ Inara ↗
Active: 3301-07-23 → 3301-08-06
System Overview

Una is a star system in the Elite Dangerous universe, significant from 3301-07-23 to 3301-08-06. Associated with Newton Dock Medical. The Cerberus Plague has reached Hart Station in Bast, Hoard Orbital in Una, and Cantor Terminal in Santjalan. Despite a cure being found, the Cerberus Plague continues to affect starports in Bastes, Maheou Ti, Ochoeng, Una, and Santjalan.

System Data
Coordinates: [-11.09375, 41.09375, 90.53125]
Allegiance: Independent
Government: Cooperative
Controlling Faction: Social Eleu Progressive Party
Security: High
Economy: High Tech
Population: 20.6M

Mentions Timeline (3 articles)
3301-08-06
Fight Against Cerberus Plague Gains Ground
The fight against the Cerberus Plague is gaining ground as medical teams deliver antidotes to affected systems. The plague has been eradicated from Dajoar, Bastes, Maheou Ti, Eleu, Ochoeng, 20 Ophiuchi, Una, Santjalan, BD-02 4304, Chongguls, Xamentii, and G 139-50. Efforts continue to help those still suffering from the disease.
3301-07-30
Cerberus Plague Continues to Affect Starports
Despite a cure being found, the Cerberus Plague continues to affect starports in Bastes, Maheou Ti, Ochoeng, Una, and Santjalan. Station services including re-arming, market, bulletin board, docking, shipyard, outfitting, and black market remain unavailable. Authorities report services will stay offline until the plague is contained or eliminated.
3301-07-23
Cerberus Plague Outbreaks in the Bast, Una and Santjalan Systems
The Cerberus Plague has reached Hart Station in Bast, Hoard Orbital in Una, and Cantor Terminal in Santjalan. No cure has been found despite ongoing work by Chief Medical Officer Carl Simmons. Hospitals are overloaded as infection rates rise rapidly. Volunteers and local security are aiding health services while maintaining order. Pilots in the region are called upon to deliver medical aid.
